name: Cefotiam
description: One of the cephalosporins that has a broad spectrum of activity against both gram-positive and gram-negative microorganisms. [PubChem]
indication: For treatment of severe infections caused by susceptible bacteria.
toxicity: Adverse effects following overdosage include nausea, vomiting, epigastric distress, diarrhea, and convulsions.
mechanismOfAction: The bactericidal activity of cefotiam results from the inhibition of cell wall synthesis via affinity for penicillin-binding proteins (PBPs).
pharmacodynamics: Cefotiam is a third generation beta-lactam cephalosporin antibiotic. It has broad spectrum activity against Gram positive and Gram negative bacteria. It does not have activity against Pseudomonas aeruginosa. Cefotiam works by inhibiting bacterial cell wall biosynthesis.

interactions.name: BCG vaccine
interactions.description: The therapeutic efficacy of BCG vaccine can be decreased when used in combination with Cefotiam.

interactions.name: Picosulfuric acid
interactions.description: The therapeutic efficacy of Picosulfuric acid can be decreased when used in combination with Cefotiam.

interactions.name: Warfarin
interactions.description: Cefotiam may increase the anticoagulant activities of Warfarin.

interactions.name: Dicoumarol
interactions.description: Cefotiam may increase the anticoagulant activities of Dicoumarol.

interactions.name: Phenindione
interactions.description: Cefotiam may increase the anticoagulant activities of Phenindione.

interactions.name: Phenprocoumon
interactions.description: Cefotiam may increase the anticoagulant activities of Phenprocoumon.

interactions.name: Acenocoumarol
interactions.description: Cefotiam may increase the anticoagulant activities of Acenocoumarol.

interactions.name: Ethyl biscoumacetate
interactions.description: Cefotiam may increase the anticoagulant activities of Ethyl biscoumacetate.

interactions.name: Fluindione
interactions.description: Cefotiam may increase the anticoagulant activities of Fluindione.

interactions.name: Clorindione
interactions.description: Cefotiam may increase the anticoagulant activities of Clorindione.

interactions.name: Diphenadione
interactions.description: Cefotiam may increase the anticoagulant activities of Diphenadione.

interactions.name: Tioclomarol
interactions.description: Cefotiam may increase the anticoagulant activities of Tioclomarol.

interactions.name: Probenecid
interactions.description: The serum concentration of Cefotiam can be increased when it is combined with Probenecid.
